title: PureMate 20L Smart WiFi​ Dehumidifier ​for Home, Large 6.5L Tank or Continuous Drainage, Sleep Mode,​ Adjustable​ Humidity Sensor​, Laundry Drying​, 24H Timer​, Ideal for Damp​ & Condensation
features: Smart WiFi Control – Connect your dehumidifier to the Smart Life app for effortless remote operation. Adjust settings, monitor humidity, and switch modes anytime, anywhere using your smartphone.

Large Capacity & Continuous Drainage – Removes up to 20L of excess moisture per day using an efficient compressor, with a 6.5L removable water tank or the option for continuous drainage, ideal for long-term use.
Advanced Humidity Sensing – State-of-the-art sensor with LED display and an intuitive 3-light indicator system keeps you updated on humidity levels at a glance.
Sleep Mode for Peaceful Nights – Activate Sleep Mode to switch off display lights, ensuring undisturbed rest while the unit quietly maintains a comfortable environment.
Portable & Easy to Move – Designed with four smooth-rolling castor wheels, making it simple to move from room to room or store away when not in use.
Fresh, Clean Air – Effectively reduces damp, odours, and mould. Includes an optional ioniser that releases negative ions, helping create a hypoallergenic space for allergy sufferers.
